title: E2E R2: Dev incremental — TaskQueue in 3 phases
body:
Build a TaskQueue class incrementally in task_queue.py with tests in test_task_queue.py.

Phase 1 — Basic queue: enqueue(item), dequeue() -> item, peek() -> item, is_empty() -> bool, size() -> int. dequeue/peek on empty queue raise IndexError.

Phase 2 — Priority support: enqueue(item, priority=0) where higher priority dequeues first. Items with same priority follow FIFO order. Update existing tests + add priority-specific tests.

Phase 3 — Capacity limit: __init__(max_size=None), is_full() -> bool, enqueue raises OverflowError when full. Add timeout parameter to enqueue(item, priority=0, timeout=None) that waits up to timeout seconds before raising TimeoutError. Update existing tests + add capacity tests.

Each phase MUST read the existing code first and extend it — do NOT rewrite from scratch. All files in the working directory.

cycle.prompt: Plan the changes for this phase. Read existing code first. List specific modifications to make.
Implement the planned changes. Read existing files before modifying. Use Edit tool for modifications, Write tool for new files.
Fix the validation errors. Read the existing code and error output. Make minimum changes.
